name: Dictation playback: rework pacing around clear speech and phrase/sentence pauses
description: Rework dictation playback pacing from the closed PR #1749 per-word handwriting-cost model to an evidence-informed dictation model based on docs/analysis/research/dictation-deep-research-report.md: natural clear speech, short inter-word timing, phrase/sentence boundary pauses, explicit writing/proofreading windows, and text-length/load controls by age/profile.
acceptanceCriteria: Outcome: dictation playback no longer uses the PR #1749 age-scaled per-word/per-character silence model as the product default. It follows the research report: natural clear speech, short inter-word gaps, audible phrase grouping, sentence-final pauses, and separate writing/proofreading windows. Typical defaults should anchor near phrase pauses 0.4-0.7s and sentence pauses 0.8-1.4s, with support/younger settings allowed to expand sentence/item windows rather than making speech robotic. Age/profile adaptation should primarily adjust text length, chunking, repetition, and response time; do not introduce diagnosis-specific magic constants without product data. Regression tests cover the timing helpers/playback scheduling, and the PR notes include an on-device feel-check for normal and slow.
bodyText:
Completion Summary — 2026-06-25
**What was done:**
WI-904 (dictation playback: 'normal' pace too fast — lengthen pauses between words) was found to be ALREADY RESOLVED on `origin/main` at the time this wave claimed it. No new code was written. The fix was verified present and correct, so the item is moved to Reviewing pointing at the landing commit.
**What changed:**
No new changes in this wave. The behavior was delivered by commit `540a5b702` ("fix(mobile): dictation review timeout, previous-sentence control, and longer pauses [WI-901] [WI-903] [WI-904]"), verified to be an ancestor of `origin/main`. The pace tuning lives in `PACE_CONFIG` (normal rate=0.6, chunkPausePerWord=3000ms, sentencePause=4000ms) — lengthened pauses between words rather than slowing articulation, exactly as the AC specified.
**Verification:**
- `git log` confirms commit `540a5b702` exists and references `[WI-904]`.
- `git merge-base --is-ancestor 540a5b702 origin/main` → YES (reachable from main).
- `PACE_CONFIG` pause values confirmed present on main (pauses lengthened, articulation rate unchanged).
**Caveats / Follow-ups:**
This item was already implemented before the wave claimed it; `Fixed In` is the pre-existing commit `540a5b702`. Reviewer should confirm the 'normal' pace feels right during QA. No duplicate code was introduced.
